hero.heading: Be part of Devcon 8
hero.body_line_1: The Supporters Program is how teams across the ecosystem contribute to Devcon
hero.body_line_2: and take their place within it.
hero.body_tagline: More than a sponsorship. An invitation to participate.

community_banner.prefix: Devcon is built by the teams that

points.title: Be present, not just listed
points.body: Supporter teams are part of the event. They're in the space, engaging with attendees, and recognized as the projects that make Devcon possible.

points.title: Community of shared principles
points.body: Join people who care about the same things you do; open systems, privacy, and the long-term health of shared infrastructure.

points.title: Put your principles into practice
points.body: Devcon exists to serve the ecosystem, not extract from it. Supporting is a way to put resources behind the things the community actually cares about.

what_is.heading: What is the Supporters Program?
what_is.body_p1: The Supporters Program is how ecosystem projects contribute to Devcon and participate in it.
what_is.body_p2_strong: Supporter teams are part of the event
what_is.body_p2_rest: – present in the space, visible to the community, and recognized alongside the projects that make Devcon possible. Instead of a traditional sponsorship, this is an opportunity to give back to the ecosystem and be part of the conference.

who_can.heading: Who can participate?
who_can.body_p1_prefix: Projects building on or for Ethereum that share the principles outlined in the
who_can.body_p2_prefix: In this edition, we are prioritizing projects that are aligned with
who_can.body_p2_suffix: . If your project shares these principles, we'd love to hear from you.

impact.heading: Impact Program
impact.body_strong: Free and open source. Public goods. Non-profits.
impact.body_intro: Some of the most important work doesn't have a budget – across Ethereum and beyond. Impact Booths are free booth spaces reserved for these teams. The Impact Program offers two ways to participate:

tracks.body: A free physical booth space at Devcon for FOSS projects and non-profits contributing to Ethereum's public infrastructure.
Digital presence on Devcon's platforms and a set of tickets to attend, for aligned entities.

apply.label: Want more information?
apply.review_prefix: We review applications on a rolling basis and will get back to you
apply.contact_prefix: Got a question? Contact us at
